name: camera-teleport-scriptable-visibility
description: Verify Scriptable camera ownership, long-distance teleport rebasing, and player visibility without zoom or transparency.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local g=p.PlayerGui:WaitForChild('PunchWallHUD') local cam=workspace.CurrentCamera local root=p.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart') shared.CameraTeleportOldMin=p.CameraMinZoomDistance shared.CameraTeleportOldMax=p.CameraMaxZoomDistance local desired=CFrame.lookAt(root.Position+Vector3.new(18,12,18),root.Position+Vector3.new(0,1.5,0)) cam.CameraType=Enum.CameraType.Scriptable cam.CFrame=desired cam.Focus=CFrame.new(root.Position+Vector3.new(0,1.5,0)) task.wait(.6) local scriptError=(cam.CFrame.Position-desired.Position).Magnitude local scriptValid=cam.CameraType==Enum.CameraType.Scriptable and scriptError<.05 and g:GetAttribute('PunchCameraScriptableBypass')==true p.CameraMinZoomDistance=12 p.CameraMaxZoomDistance=12 cam.CameraType=Enum.CameraType.Custom task.wait(.8) shared.CameraTeleportBaselineDistance=(cam.CFrame.Position-(root.Position+Vector3.new(0,1.5,0))).Magnitude shared.CameraTeleportRebaseBefore=g:GetAttribute('PunchCameraTeleportRebaseCount') or 0 return H:JSONEncode({scriptValid=scriptValid,scriptError=scriptError,bypass=g:GetAttribute('PunchCameraScriptableBypass'),baselineDistance=shared.CameraTeleportBaselineDistance,rebaseBefore=shared.CameraTeleportRebaseBefore,type=cam.CameraType.Name})

steps.label: scriptable camera remains under caller control

args.code: local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=p.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart') root.AssemblyLinearVelocity=Vector3.zero root.AssemblyAngularVelocity=Vector3.zero root.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-42,3,31),Vector3.new(-42,3,20)) return true

steps.label: teleport player to distant training area

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local g=p.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local cam=workspace.CurrentCamera local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart local deadline=os.clock()+3 repeat local count=g:GetAttribute('PunchCameraTeleportRebaseCount') or 0 local distance=(cam.CFrame.Position-(root.Position+Vector3.new(0,1.5,0))).Magnitude if count>(shared.CameraTeleportRebaseBefore or 0) and distance<20 then break end task.wait(.05) until os.clock()>=deadline local distance=(cam.CFrame.Position-(root.Position+Vector3.new(0,1.5,0))).Magnitude local rebaseCount=g:GetAttribute('PunchCameraTeleportRebaseCount') or 0 local overlap=OverlapParams.new() overlap.FilterType=Enum.RaycastFilterType.Exclude overlap.FilterDescendantsInstances={p.Character} local inside=0 for _,part in ipairs(workspace:GetPartBoundsInBox(CFrame.new(cam.CFrame.Position),Vector3.new(.4,.4,.4),overlap)) do if part:IsA('BasePart') and part.CanCollide and part.Transparency<.95 then inside+=1 end end local faded=0 for _,part in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do if part:IsA('BasePart') and part.LocalTransparencyModifier>.01 then faded+=1 end end local zoomDelta=math.abs(distance-(shared.CameraTeleportBaselineDistance or distance)) local valid=cam.CameraType==Enum.CameraType.Custom and rebaseCount>(shared.CameraTeleportRebaseBefore or 0) and distance<20 and zoomDelta<.25 and inside==0 and faded==0 p.CameraMinZoomDistance=shared.CameraTeleportOldMin or p.CameraMinZoomDistance p.CameraMaxZoomDistance=shared.CameraTeleportOldMax or p.CameraMaxZoomDistance return H:JSONEncode({valid=valid,type=cam.CameraType.Name,rebaseCount=rebaseCount,distance=distance,zoomDelta=zoomDelta,inside=inside,faded=faded})

steps.label: teleport rebases camera without zoom or transparency
